body.raw: {"query":"query getScheduleByFeeds($feed: Feeds!, $from: String, $to: String, $count: Int) { getScheduleByFeeds(feed: $feed, from: $from, to: $to, count: $count) { dateFrom dateTo offset feeds { code link logo description shows { id titleId title originalTitle genreList highlightList airDateTime lang begin end rate serie season episode storyline offset franchiseName franchiseId ratingArgentina ratingBrasil ratingMexico length summary hash status } } } }","variables":{"feed":"demo-feed","from":"demo-from","to":"demo-to","count":10}}

{"query":"query getScheduleByFeeds($feed: Feeds!, $from: String, $to: String, $count: Int) { getScheduleByFeeds(feed: $feed, from: $from, to: $to, count: $count) { dateFrom dateTo offset feeds { code link logo description shows { id titleId title originalTitle genreList highlightList airDateTime lang begin end rate serie season episode storyline offset franchiseName franchiseId ratingArgentina ratingBrasil ratingMexico length summary hash status } } } }","variables":{"feed":"demo-feed","from":"demo-from","to":"demo-to","count":10}}
